short_en: Climb China's most legendary peak for its famous pines and seas of cloud, then wander millennium-old Huizhou villages and lantern-lit old streets.
short_zh: 登黄山赏奇松云海，访千年徽州古村与灯火璀璨的老街，看尽"五岳归来不看山"的极致风光。
desc_en: This 3-day journey pairs the iconic scenery of Huangshan (Yellow Mountain) with the timeless charm of old Huizhou. You'll hike and ride cable cars among Huangshan's gnarled pines, granite peaks and rolling seas of cloud, then slow down in the thousand-year village of Chengkan, the Song-dynasty Tunxi Old Street, and the dreamy Xixinan wetlands. As the saying goes, "Return from the Five Great Mountains and you'll see no other peaks; return from Huangshan and you'll see no other of the Five." It's the perfect blend of mountain grandeur and gentle riverside village life.
desc_zh: 这趟三日行程将黄山的标志性山景与古徽州的悠然韵味融为一体。你将在黄山的奇松、花岗岩峰林与云海间徒步、搭乘缆车，再放慢脚步走进千年古村呈坎、始建于宋代的屯溪老街，以及如诗如画的西溪南湿地。正所谓"登五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳"，这是山岳壮美与江南古村慢生活的完美结合。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking/hiking shoes, layered clothing for changeable mountain weather, a light rain jacket, ID/passport, sun protection, water bottle, and a camera.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适的步行/登山鞋、可叠穿的衣物（山上天气多变）、轻便雨衣、身份证/护照、防晒用品、水壶和相机。

highlights.en: Huangshan Scenic Area (黄山, National 5A): hike or ride cable cars up to Bai'e Ridge, Shixin Peak, Bright Summit (Guangmingding) and Yuping Tower to admire Huangshan's famous pines and seas of cloud.
highlights.zh: 国家 5A 级黄山风景区：徒步或乘缆车登白鹅岭、始信峰、光明顶、玉屏楼，赏黄山奇松与云海。

highlights.en: Chengkan Ancient Village (呈坎): a millennium-old Huizhou village praised by Zhu Xi as 'the finest village south of the Yangtze,' famed for its exquisite wood, brick and stone carvings, with an evening fish-lantern show.
highlights.zh: 呈坎古村：朱熹称'江南第一村'的千年徽州古村，三雕精美，夜可观鱼灯表演。

highlights.en: Tunxi Old Street (屯溪老街) by night: founded in the Song dynasty, the best-preserved Song-Ming-Qing pedestrian street, glowing with lanterns and shopfronts after dark.
highlights.zh: 夜游屯溪老街：始建于宋代，宋明清三朝建筑保存最完整的步行街，入夜灯火辉煌。

highlights.en: Xixinan Wetlands (西溪南): a poetic countryside of poplar forests, winding streams and stone bridges, especially magical wrapped in morning mist.
highlights.zh: 西溪南湿地：枫杨林环绕、溪流石桥相映的田园诗境，晨雾中的古村尤为梦幻。

highlights.en: Hike-and-cable-car combo: a flexible mix of walking the mountain trails and riding the cable car so you can savour the scenery without exhausting yourself.
highlights.zh: 徒步与缆车结合：可灵活选择步行山道或搭乘缆车，轻松饱览山色而不至于太累。

highlights.en: Ancient Huizhou carvings: encounter the renowned 'three Huizhou carvings' (wood, brick, stone) up close in genuine, lived-in heritage villages.
highlights.zh: 古徽州三雕：在原汁原味、仍有人居的古村中近距离欣赏徽州三雕（木雕、砖雕、石雕）。

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Hefei – Chengkan – Tangkou
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：合肥 — 呈坎 — 汤口
timeline.desc_en: 08:00-12:30 Depart Hefei: set off by coach toward Huangshan. 14:00-16:00 Chengkan Ancient Village (呈坎): a thousand-year-old Huizhou village that Zhu Xi praised as 'the village of two sages, the finest village south of the Yangtze,' celebrated for its exquisite wood, brick and stone carvings; in the evening you can watch the fish-lantern show. 16:30 Check in at the hotel in Tangkou Town (汤口镇). 18:00-19:00 Dinner.
timeline.desc_zh: 08:00-12:30 合肥出发：乘车前往黄山。14:00-16:00 游览呈坎古村：朱熹称'呈坎双贤里、江南第一村'，千年徽州古村，三雕精美，夜可观鱼灯表演。16:30 入住汤口镇酒店。18:00-19:00 晚餐。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Huangshan Scenic Area – Tunxi Old Street
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：黄山风景区 — 屯溪老街
timeline.desc_en: 09:10-16:30 Huangshan Scenic Area (黄山, National 5A): take the scenic shuttle bus to Yungu Temple (云谷寺), then cable car or hike up to Bai'e Ridge (白鹅岭), Shixin Peak (始信峰), Bright Summit / Guangmingding (光明顶) and Yuping Tower (玉屏楼) to admire Huangshan's celebrated pines. 18:30-20:30 Evening stroll on Tunxi Old Street (屯溪老街): first built in the Song dynasty, the most completely preserved Song-, Ming- and Qing-era pedestrian street.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:10-16:30 游览国家 5A 级黄山风景区：景区大巴至云谷寺，缆车或徒步至白鹅岭、始信峰、光明顶、玉屏楼，赏黄山名松。18:30-20:30 夜游屯溪老街：宋代始建，宋明清三朝建筑保存最完整的步行街。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Xixinan Wetlands – Return
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：西溪南湿地 — 返程
timeline.desc_en: 09:30-11:30 Xixinan Wetlands (西溪南): a poetic countryside scene encircled by poplar (fengyang) forests, with streams and stone bridges reflecting one another and the ancient village wreathed in morning mist. 13:00-17:30 Return to Hefei.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30-11:30 西溪南湿地：枫杨林环绕，溪流石桥相映，田园诗意，晨雾中的古村。13:00-17:30 返回合肥。

short_en: Three days through the whitewashed walls and water-village charm of Huizhou — memorial arches, an ancient walled city, a hundred-mile river gallery, and the painting-like village of Hongcun.
short_zh: 三天深度走进白墙黛瓦、小桥流水的徽州古韵——棠樾牌坊群、徽州古城、新安江山水画廊与如画的宏村。
desc_en: This three-day journey is an immersive dive into the culture of Huizhou, the land of white walls and black-tiled roofs, arched bridges and flowing streams. From the Tangyue Memorial Archways and the ancient walled city of Shexian, you cruise the hundred-mile Xin'an River landscape gallery, wander the wetland wonderland of Xixinan, and stroll the Song-, Ming- and Qing-era shops of Tunxi Old Street. The tour culminates at Hongcun, the "village in a painting" with its ingenious ox-shaped water system, weaving together Huizhou architecture, woodcarving artistry, and centuries of merchant heritage.
desc_zh: 这是一趟深入徽州文化的三日之旅，带你走进白墙黛瓦、小桥流水的水乡古韵。从棠樾牌坊群与历史悠久的徽州古城出发，乘船游览百里新安江山水画廊，漫步现实版“绿野仙踪”的西溪南湿地，再穿行宋明清商业老街屯溪老街。旅程在“画中的村庄”宏村圆满收尾——独特的牛形仿生水系、精美的徽州三雕与古商人文，串起一段完整的徽文化体验。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking shoes, passport/ID, layered clothing, a light rain jacket or umbrella for the river cruise, sunscreen and a hat, a camera, and a refillable water bottle.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适步行鞋、护照/身份证、可叠穿的衣物、游船用的轻便雨衣或雨伞、防晒霜与帽子、相机、可重复使用的水壶。

highlights.en: Tangyue Memorial Archways (棠樾牌坊群) — the "First Village of Jiangnan," with seven ancient stone arches, ancestral halls and dwellings, plus a live show of loyalty, filial piety and virtue.
highlights.zh: 棠樾牌坊群——“江南第一村”，七座古牌坊与祠堂民居，含忠孝节义历史展演。

highlights.en: Huizhou Ancient City (徽州古城) — the birthplace of Huizhou studies, home to the famed Huizhou three-carvings and the prefectural yamen, with an evening fish-lantern parade.
highlights.zh: 徽州古城——徽学发源地，徽州三雕、徽州府衙，夜赏鱼灯巡游。

highlights.en: Xin'an River Landscape Gallery cruise (新安江山水画廊) — a hundred-mile scroll along the old Huizhou merchant route, lined with ancient villages, a thousand-year camphor grove and loquat orchards.
highlights.zh: 游船新安江山水画廊——百里长卷，古徽商之路，沿岸古村、千年香樟林、枇杷林。

highlights.en: Xixinan Wetland (西溪南湿地) — a real-life "wonderland" of maple-poplar woods, streams and stone bridges, the quintessence of Jiangnan water-village scenery.
highlights.zh: 西溪南湿地——现实版绿野仙踪，枫杨林、溪流、石桥，江南小桥流水。

highlights.en: Tunxi Old Street (屯溪老街) — China's best-preserved Song, Ming and Qing commercial pedestrian street.
highlights.zh: 屯溪老街——中国保存最完好的宋明清商业步行街。

highlights.en: Hongcun (宏村) — the "village in a painting" with its unique ox-shaped bionic water system and the exquisitely carved Chengzhi Hall, dubbed the "Folk Forbidden City."
highlights.zh: 宏村——“画中的村庄”，独特牛形仿生水系，承志堂三雕精美，“民间故宫”。

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Hefei – Shexian (Tangyue Archways & Huizhou Ancient City)
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：合肥 — 歙县
timeline.desc_en: 08:00-12:30 Depart Hefei for Shexian (合肥出发前往歙县): morning transfer to the heart of Huizhou. 13:30-14:30 Tangyue Memorial Archways (棠樾牌坊群): the "First Village of Jiangnan," with seven ancient stone arches alongside ancestral halls and dwellings, featuring a historical performance of loyalty, filial piety and virtue. 14:50-17:00 Huizhou Ancient City (徽州古城): the birthplace of Huizhou studies, showcasing the Huizhou three-carvings and the prefectural yamen, capped by an evening fish-lantern parade. Overnight in Shexian.
timeline.desc_zh: 08:00-12:30 合肥出发前往歙县：上午乘车前往徽州腹地。13:30-14:30 棠樾牌坊群：“江南第一村”，七座古牌坊与祠堂民居，含忠孝节义历史展演。14:50-17:00 徽州古城：徽学发源地，徽州三雕、徽州府衙，夜赏鱼灯巡游。宿歙县。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Xin'an River Gallery – Xixinan – Tunxi Old Street
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：新安江山水画廊 — 西溪南 — 屯溪老街
timeline.desc_en: 09:00-12:00 Cruise the Xin'an River Landscape Gallery (游船新安江山水画廊): a hundred-mile scroll along the old Huizhou merchant route, with ancient villages, a thousand-year camphor grove and loquat orchards lining the banks. 14:30-16:00 Xixinan Wetland (西溪南湿地): a real-life "wonderland" of maple-poplar woods, streams and stone bridges — the very picture of Jiangnan water-village charm. 16:30-18:00 Tunxi Old Street (屯溪老街): China's best-preserved Song, Ming and Qing commercial pedestrian street. Overnight in Huangshan City.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:00-12:00 游船新安江山水画廊：百里长卷，古徽商之路，沿岸古村、千年香樟林、枇杷林。14:30-16:00 西溪南湿地：现实版绿野仙踪，枫杨林、溪流、石桥，江南小桥流水。16:30-18:00 屯溪老街：中国保存最完好的宋明清商业步行街。宿黄山市。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Hongcun – Hefei
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：宏村 — 合肥
timeline.desc_en: 10:00-12:00 Hongcun (宏村): the "village in a painting," famed for its unique ox-shaped bionic water system and the exquisitely carved Chengzhi Hall, often called the "Folk Forbidden City." 13:30-18:00 Return to Hefei (返回合肥): afternoon transfer back, ending the tour.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:00-12:00 宏村：“画中的村庄”，独特牛形仿生水系，承志堂三雕精美，“民间故宫”。13:30-18:00 返回合肥：下午乘车返程，行程结束。

short_en: Three days of Danxia red-rock cliffs, Taoist heritage, and Huizhou culture on "the finest mountain south of the Yangtze."
short_zh: 三天领略丹霞地貌、道教文化与徽州古韵，登临"江南第一名山"齐云山。
desc_en: Discover the soul of Huizhou on this three-day escape blending dramatic landscapes with living Taoist tradition. You'll trek the waterfalls and emerald pools of the Huizhou Grand Canyon, climb Mount Qiyun—the "finest mountain south of the Yangtze," famed for its crimson Danxia cliffs and centuries of stone inscriptions—and drift on bamboo rafts beneath ancient riverside trees. The journey closes among the eight-trigram lanes of Chengkan Ancient Village and the Ming-dynasty courtyards of Qiankou, where the carved beams and stone archways of classic Huizhou architecture come to life.
desc_zh: 这趟三日之旅将壮丽山水与鲜活的道家文化融为一体，带你走进徽州的灵魂。第一天畅游徽州大峡谷的悬崖瀑布与碧绿深潭，次日登临以丹霞地貌和千年石刻闻名的"江南第一名山"齐云山，并乘竹筏漂流于两岸千年古木之间，夜游月华街。最后一天走进天然八卦古村呈坎与明代徽派建筑群潜口民宅，于雕梁画栋、小桥牌坊间感受徽派建筑艺术的精髓。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking/hiking shoes, light rain jacket, quick-dry clothes for the bamboo-raft rafting, layered clothing, sun hat and sunscreen, ID/passport, power bank, and a small daypack.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适的徒步鞋、轻便雨衣、漂流用速干衣物、多层保暖衣物、遮阳帽与防晒霜、身份证/护照、充电宝，以及一个小背包。

highlights.en: Huizhou Grand Canyon (徽州大峡谷): cliffside waterfalls, emerald deep pools and ancient pines, with the option of thrilling whitewater rafting.
highlights.zh: 徽州大峡谷：悬崖瀑布、碧绿深潭、苍松翠柏，可体验刺激漂流。

highlights.en: Mount Qiyun (齐云山): the "finest mountain south of the Yangtze," renowned for red Danxia rock formations, deep Taoist heritage and countless historic stone inscriptions.
highlights.zh: 齐云山：江南第一名山，以丹霞地貌、道教文化和众多历史石刻著称。

highlights.en: Bamboo-raft drift below Mount Qiyun (齐云山下竹筏漂流): glide along a beautiful river framed by thousand-year-old trees on both banks.
highlights.zh: 齐云山下竹筏漂流：两岸千年古木簇拥，秀美江景。

highlights.en: Evening stroll on Yuehua Street (月华街): wander Qiyun's lantern-lit Taoist mountain village by night.
highlights.zh: 夜游月华街：夜赏齐云山道教山村灯火。

highlights.en: Chengkan Ancient Village (呈坎): a natural eight-trigram (bagua) village and "twice-honored national-treasure village," showcasing Huizhou's famed three-carving art and ancient architecture.
highlights.zh: 呈坎：天然八卦古村，'两国宝古村'，徽派三雕与古建筑艺术。

highlights.en: Qiankou Residences (潜口民宅): a relocated Ming-dynasty Huizhou architectural complex of ancestral halls, dwellings, bridges, pavilions and memorial archways—"for palaces go to Beijing, for folk houses come to Qiankou."
highlights.zh: 潜口民宅：'看故宫去北京、看民宅来潜口'，明代徽派建筑群，含祠堂、民居、小桥、路亭、牌坊。

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Hefei – Huangshan – Huizhou Grand Canyon
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：合肥 — 徽州大峡谷
timeline.desc_en: 08:00–12:30 Depart Hefei for Huangshan: morning transfer to the Huangshan area. 13:40–17:00 Huizhou Grand Canyon (徽州大峡谷): explore cliffside waterfalls, emerald deep pools and ancient pines and cypresses, with the option of an exhilarating whitewater rafting experience. Overnight in Xiuning County; lunch and dinner included.
timeline.desc_zh: 08:00–12:30 合肥出发前往黄山：上午乘车前往黄山。13:40–17:00 徽州大峡谷：悬崖瀑布、碧绿深潭、苍松翠柏，可体验刺激漂流。宿休宁县，含午餐、晚餐。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Mount Qiyun – Bamboo-Raft Drift – Yuehua Street
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：齐云山
timeline.desc_en: 09:00–11:30 Mount Qiyun (齐云山): the "finest mountain south of the Yangtze," famed for its Danxia red-rock landscape, Taoist culture and numerous historic stone inscriptions. 13:00–15:00 Bamboo-raft drift below Mount Qiyun (齐云山下竹筏漂流): float along a lovely river embraced by thousand-year-old trees on both banks. 19:00–20:30 Evening stroll on Yuehua Street (月华街): explore the mountain village by night. Overnight in Xiuning County; breakfast, lunch and dinner included.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:00–11:30 齐云山：丹霞地貌、道教文化，江南第一名山，历史石刻众多。13:00–15:00 齐云山下竹筏漂流：两岸千年古木簇拥，秀美江景。19:00–20:30 夜游月华街。宿休宁县，含早餐、午餐、晚餐。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Chengkan – Qiankou Residences – Hefei
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：呈坎 — 潜口民宅 — 合肥
timeline.desc_en: 09:30–12:30 Chengkan Ancient Village (呈坎): a natural eight-trigram (bagua) village and "twice-honored national-treasure village," showcasing Huizhou three-carving artistry and ancient architecture. Afternoon: Qiankou Residences (潜口民宅): "for palaces go to Beijing, for folk houses come to Qiankou"—a Ming-dynasty Huizhou architectural complex with ancestral halls, dwellings, small bridges, roadside pavilions and memorial archways. 13:30–18:00 Return to Hefei. Breakfast and lunch included.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30–12:30 呈坎：天然八卦古村，'两国宝古村'，徽派三雕与古建筑艺术。下午 潜口民宅：'看故宫去北京、看民宅来潜口'，明代徽派建筑群，包含祠堂、民居、小桥、路亭、牌坊。13:30–18:00 返回合肥。含早餐、午餐。

short_en: Drift through Li Bai's legendary Peach Blossom Pond, wander timeless Ming-Qing villages, and watch ancient Xuan paper made by hand on this 3-day journey into southern Anhui's poetry and landscapes.
short_zh: 乘竹筏漂游李白笔下的桃花潭，漫步明清古村落，亲眼见证国家级非遗宣纸的手工制作——三天尽揽皖南的诗意山水与文化。
desc_en: This three-day loop out of Hefei pairs the poetry of the Tang master Li Bai with the living craft heritage of southern Anhui. Glide by bamboo raft through the "Little Li River" of Pingyuan, drift past the Peach Blossom Pond immortalized in Li Bai's farewell verse, and lose yourself in the bridges, ancestral halls and carved beams of Chaji Ancient Village. The journey closes at the China Xuan Paper Culture Park, where you can watch — and even try — the UNESCO-recognized art of handmade Xuan paper. Culture and scenery, in equal measure.
desc_zh: 这条从合肥出发的三日环线，将李白的诗意与皖南的非遗匠心融为一体。在"皖南小漓江"平垣秘境乘竹筏游山水，漂过李白《赠汪伦》中"桃花潭水深千尺"的桃花潭，再于查济古村的小桥流水、祠堂与明清雕梁间流连忘返。行程以中国宣纸文化园收尾，在这里可以观赏并亲手体验国家级非物质文化遗产宣纸的手工制作。文化与山水，一次兼得。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking shoes, light layers, a rain jacket or umbrella, sunscreen and hat, a reusable water bottle, camera, and ID/passport.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适的步行鞋、轻便分层衣物、雨衣或雨伞、防晒霜与遮阳帽、可重复使用的水壶、相机以及身份证/护照。

highlights.en: Pingyuan Mijing (平垣秘境), the "Little Li River of Southern Anhui" — drift through misty karst scenery on a bamboo raft and join the playful Fengyang market team activities
highlights.zh: 平垣秘境——"皖南小漓江"，乘竹筏游赏烟雨山水，体验凤阳集市趣味团建

highlights.en: Yueliangwan (Moon Bay) Scenic Area, ringed by a hundred li of bamboo forest and a filming location for many classic Chinese movies and TV dramas
highlights.zh: 月亮湾景区——百里竹海环绕，多部经典影视剧的取景外景地

highlights.en: Peach Blossom Pond (桃花潭), immortalized by Li Bai's farewell poem "To Wang Lun": even a pond a thousand feet deep cannot match Wang Lun's parting friendship
highlights.zh: 桃花潭——李白《赠汪伦》中"桃花潭水深千尺，不及汪伦送我情"的传世之地

highlights.en: Chaji Ancient Village (查济古村), a tranquil maze of little bridges over flowing water, Ming-Qing carved beams, and countless old stone bridges and ancestral halls
highlights.zh: 查济古村——小桥流水古韵悠然，明清雕梁建筑、众多古桥与祠堂

highlights.en: China Xuan Paper Culture Park (中国宣纸文化园), home to the UNESCO-listed craft of handmade Xuan paper, with paid hands-on papermaking and rubbing experiences
highlights.zh: 中国宣纸文化园——国家级非物质文化遗产宣纸的手工制作，可付费体验造纸与拓印

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Hefei – Jingxian – Pingyuan – Moon Bay
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：合肥 — 泾县 — 平垣 — 月亮湾
timeline.desc_en: 09:00-11:30 Depart Hefei for Jingxian (合肥出发前往泾县): set off on the morning drive into southern Anhui. 13:00-15:00 Pingyuan Mijing (平垣秘境): the "Little Li River of Southern Anhui" — drift through the landscape by bamboo raft and enjoy the playful Fengyang market team-building activities. 16:30-17:30 Yueliangwan / Moon Bay Scenic Area (月亮湾景区): ringed by a hundred li of bamboo forest and a filming location for many classic Chinese films and TV dramas.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:00-11:30 合肥出发前往泾县：上午驱车前往皖南。13:00-15:00 平垣秘境："皖南小漓江"，乘竹筏游山水，凤阳集市趣味团建。16:30-17:30 月亮湾景区：百里竹海环绕，多部经典影视外景地。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Peach Blossom Pond – Chaji Ancient Village
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：桃花潭 — 查济古村
timeline.desc_en: 10:00-11:30 Peach Blossom Pond (桃花潭): immortalized in Li Bai's "To Wang Lun" — "the Peach Blossom Pond is a thousand feet deep, yet cannot match Wang Lun's friendship in seeing me off." 13:00-15:00 Chaji Ancient Village (查济古村): little bridges over flowing water and serene antique charm, with Ming-Qing carved-beam architecture and numerous old bridges and ancestral halls.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:00-11:30 桃花潭：李白《赠汪伦》"桃花潭水深千尺，不及汪伦送我情"。13:00-15:00 查济古村：小桥流水古韵悠然，明清雕梁建筑、众多古桥与祠堂。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: China Xuan Paper Culture Park – Hefei
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：中国宣纸文化园 — 合肥
timeline.desc_en: 09:00-11:00 China Xuan Paper Culture Park (中国宣纸文化园): see the handmade production process of Xuan paper, a national intangible cultural heritage, with optional paid papermaking and rubbing experiences. 12:30-15:30 Return to Hefei (返回合肥): drive back to Hefei as the tour concludes.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:00-11:00 中国宣纸文化园：国家级非物质文化遗产宣纸的手工制作过程，可付费体验造纸与拓印。12:30-15:30 返回合肥：驱车返回合肥，行程结束。

short_en: Three days in "paradise on earth" Suzhou — two of Jiangnan's four great gardens, the legendary Cold Mountain Temple, and China's No.1 water town, Zhouzhuang.
short_zh: 三天畅游"人间天堂"苏州——江南四大名园中的两座、闻名千年的寒山寺，以及"中国第一水乡"周庄。
desc_en: As the old saying goes, "In heaven there is paradise, on earth Suzhou and Hangzhou" — and this 3-day tour shows you exactly why, with Jiangnan's finest classical gardens at its heart. You'll climb to the 2,500-year-old Tiger Hill with its leaning pagoda and ancient Sword Pool, wander the UNESCO-listed Humble Administrator's Garden and Lingering Garden (two of China's four great gardens), and visit the poetry-famed Cold Mountain Temple. The journey ends amid the canals, stone bridges, and Ming-Qing mansions of Zhouzhuang, celebrated as "China's No.1 water town."
desc_zh: "上有天堂，下有苏杭"——这趟三日之旅以江南最精致的古典园林为核心，带你领略苏州为何被誉为人间天堂。你将登上 2500 年历史的虎丘，欣赏千年斜塔与春秋古剑池；漫步列入世界文化遗产的拙政园与留园（中国四大名园中的两座）；并探访因诗成名的寒山寺。行程在"中国第一水乡"周庄的小桥流水、明清古宅之间画上句点。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking shoes, passport, light layers, sunscreen and a hat, a foldable umbrella or rain jacket, a refillable water bottle, and a camera.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适的步行鞋、护照、轻便外套（方便增减）、防晒霜与遮阳帽、折叠雨伞或雨衣、可重复使用的水壶，以及相机。

highlights.en: Tiger Hill (虎丘) — hailed as the "finest sight in Wuzhong," centered on the thousand-year-old leaning Yunyan Pagoda and the Spring-and-Autumn-era ancient Sword Pool, an icon of 2,500 years of Wu culture
highlights.zh: 虎丘——'吴中第一名胜'，以千年斜塔云岩寺塔与春秋古剑池为核心，是 2500 年吴文化的标志性景区

highlights.en: Humble Administrator's Garden (拙政园) — Suzhou's largest surviving classical garden and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built around water with ever-shifting views, the very pinnacle of Jiangnan gardens
highlights.zh: 拙政园——苏州现存最大的古典园林、世界文化遗产，以水为魂、移步换景，堪称江南园林之巅

highlights.en: Cold Mountain Temple (寒山寺) — a thousand-year-old monastery made world-famous by Zhang Ji's poem "Mooring by Maple Bridge at Night," the classic Fengqiao landmark
highlights.zh: 寒山寺——因张继《枫桥夜泊》而闻名于世的苏州千年古刹，'枫桥夜泊'经典地标

highlights.en: Lingering Garden (留园) — one of China's four great gardens and a World Heritage Site, renowned for its architectural artistry, a winding 700-metre corridor, and the rare Cloud-Capped Peak rockery
highlights.zh: 留园——中国四大名园之一、世界文化遗产，以建筑空间艺术著称，700 米曲折长廊与罕见奇石冠云峰，咫尺之内再造乾坤

highlights.en: Zhouzhuang (周庄) — "China's No.1 water town" with 900 years of history, grid-like canal streets, 14 ancient bridges, and Ming-Qing residences such as the Twin Bridges, Shen Hall, and Zhang Hall
highlights.zh: 周庄——'中国第一水乡'，900 年历史，井字形水街、14 座古桥与明清民居，双桥、沈厅、张厅尽显江南小桥流水人家

highlights.en: Two of China's four great classical gardens in a single trip — UNESCO World Heritage at both the Humble Administrator's Garden and the Lingering Garden
highlights.zh: 一趟旅程串联中国四大名园中的两座——拙政园与留园，皆为世界文化遗产

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Airport Pickup – Tiger Hill
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：机场接 — 虎丘
timeline.desc_en: 10:30-12:30 Travel to Suzhou: airport pickup and transfer into the city. 14:00-17:00 Tiger Hill (虎丘): explore the "finest sight in Wuzhong," centered on the thousand-year-old leaning Yunyan Pagoda and the Spring-and-Autumn-era ancient Sword Pool — an iconic site of 2,500 years of Wu culture. 17:30-18:30 Dinner, then check in to the hotel and rest.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:30-12:30 前往苏州：机场接团，前往市区。14:00-17:00 游览虎丘：'吴中第一名胜'，以千年斜塔云岩寺塔与春秋古剑池为核心，代表 2500 年吴文化的标志性景区。17:30-18:30 晚餐，入住酒店休息。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Humble Administrator's Garden – Cold Mountain Temple – Lingering Garden
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：拙政园 — 寒山寺 — 留园
timeline.desc_en: 09:30-11:30 Humble Administrator's Garden (拙政园): Suzhou's largest surviving classical garden and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, built around water with ever-shifting scenery — the pinnacle of Jiangnan gardens. 13:20-15:00 Cold Mountain Temple (寒山寺): a thousand-year-old Suzhou monastery made world-famous by Zhang Ji's poem "Mooring by Maple Bridge at Night," the classic Fengqiao landmark. 15:10-17:10 Lingering Garden (留园): one of China's four great gardens and a World Heritage Site, celebrated for its architectural artistry, a winding 700-metre corridor, and the rare Cloud-Capped Peak rockery — a whole world recreated within a tiny space.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30-11:30 拙政园：苏州现存最大的古典园林，世界文化遗产，以水为魂、移步换景，江南园林之巅。13:20-15:00 寒山寺：因张继《枫桥夜泊》而闻名于世的苏州千年古刹，'枫桥夜泊'经典地标。15:10-17:10 留园：中国四大名园之一、世界文化遗产，以建筑空间艺术著称，700 米长廊曲折回环，冠云峰罕见奇石，咫尺之内再造乾坤。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Zhouzhuang – Airport
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：周庄 — 机场
timeline.desc_en: 09:30-12:30 Zhouzhuang (周庄): "China's No.1 water town" with 900 years of history, grid-like canal streets, 14 ancient bridges, and Ming-Qing residences — the Twin Bridges, Shen Hall, and Zhang Hall are highlights, capturing the quintessential Jiangnan scene of small bridges, flowing water, and riverside homes. 12:30-13:30 Lunch, then transfer to the airport at the appropriate time; end of itinerary.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30-12:30 周庄：'中国第一水乡'，900 年历史，井字形水街、14 座古桥、明清民居。双桥、沈厅、张厅为代表，尽显江南小桥流水人家风格。12:30-13:30 午餐，适时送机，行程结束。

short_en: Three days of West Lake serenity, Lingyin Temple Zen and 5,000 years of civilization at the Liangzhu ruins.
short_zh: 三天饱览西湖断桥残雪、灵隐古寺禅意，再到良渚遗址感受中华五千年文明。
desc_en: This three-day journey distills the very best of Hangzhou, where the lingering snow on Broken Bridge meets the meditative calm of ancient Lingyin Temple. You'll wander the World Heritage shores of West Lake, drift through the watery lanes of Xixi Wetland, travel back in time at the spectacular Songcheng theme park, and stand before the Liangzhu ruins — hailed as the definitive proof of 5,000 years of Chinese civilization. It is a curated blend of UNESCO World Heritage sites, Jiangnan water-town charm and living history.
desc_zh: 这条三日行程浓缩了杭州的精华，西湖断桥残雪与灵隐古寺的禅意相映成趣。你将漫步世界遗产西湖之畔，泛舟西溪湿地的江南水乡，于宋城穿越古今，再到良渚遗址公园——这片被誉为"中华五千年文明实证圣地"的土地。世界文化遗产、江南水乡与活态历史在此一次饱览。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking shoes, passport/ID, layered clothing, light rain jacket or umbrella, sunscreen and hat, reusable water bottle, camera or phone with power bank.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适步行鞋、护照/身份证、可叠穿的衣物、轻便雨衣或雨伞、防晒霜与帽子、水杯、相机或手机及充电宝。

highlights.en: Lingyin Temple (灵隐寺), Hangzhou's oldest and most revered Buddhist monastery, tucked beneath Lingyin Hill west of West Lake and home to exquisite relics across the dynasties
highlights.zh: 灵隐寺——又称'云林寺'，坐落西湖西侧灵隐山下，杭州最早名刹，珍藏众多历朝精美文物

highlights.en: West Lake (西湖), a UNESCO World Heritage site since 2011 that witnessed the flourishing of Chinese Buddhist, Taoist and tea-Zen traditions
highlights.zh: 西湖景区——2011 年入选世界遗产名录，见证中国佛教文化、道教文化及茶禅传统的发展

highlights.en: Xixi National Wetland Park (西溪国家湿地公园), China's first wetland park uniting urban, farming and cultural wetlands, a 5A scenic area of misty Jiangnan waterways
highlights.zh: 西溪国家湿地公园——中国首个集城市、农耕、文化湿地于一体的国家湿地公园，5A 级景区，'一曲溪流一缕烟'的江南水乡

highlights.en: Songcheng (宋城), a time-travel theme park with over twenty theatres staging hundreds of performances — far more than you can see in a single day
highlights.zh: 宋城——穿越古今的景区，二十大剧院上百场演出，一天看不完，总有一款适合你

highlights.en: Liangzhu Archaeological Site Park (良渚文化遗址公园), dating back 4,300–5,300 years and hailed as the definitive proof of 5,000 years of Chinese civilization
highlights.zh: 良渚文化遗址公园——距今约 5300-4300 年，被誉为'中华五千年文明的实证圣地'

highlights.en: A complete sweep of UNESCO World Heritage in one trip — West Lake and the Liangzhu ruins both carry World Heritage status
highlights.zh: 一次旅程双享世界遗产——西湖与良渚遗址皆为世界文化遗产

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Airport Pickup – Lingyin Temple – West Lake
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：机场接 — 灵隐寺 — 西湖
timeline.desc_en: 10:00-12:00 Lingyin Temple (灵隐寺): Also known as 'Yunlin Temple,' set in serene grandeur beneath Lingyin Hill on the west side of West Lake; Hangzhou's oldest famous monastery, treasuring exquisite cultural relics from across the dynasties. 14:30-17:00 West Lake Scenic Area (西湖景区): A witness to the development of Chinese Buddhist culture, Taoist culture and the tea-Zen tradition, inscribed on the UNESCO World Heritage list on 24 June 2011.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:00-12:00 灵隐寺：又称'云林寺'，位于西湖西侧灵隐山下，幽静庄严，杭州最早名刹，珍藏众多历朝精美文物。14:30-17:00 西湖景区：见证中国佛教文化、道教文化以及茶禅传统的发展，2011 年 6 月 24 日入选世界遗产名录。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Xixi Wetland – Songcheng
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：西溪湿地 — 宋城
timeline.desc_en: 09:30-11:30 Xixi National Wetland Park (西溪国家湿地公园): China's first national wetland park combining urban, farming and cultural wetlands, a 5A-rated scenic area offering the misty Jiangnan water-town scenery of 'a winding stream, a wisp of smoke.' 13:00-17:00 Songcheng (宋城): A scenic park that travels through past and present and beyond imagination, with more than twenty theatres staging hundreds of performances — too many to see in a single day, with something for everyone.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30-11:30 西溪国家湿地公园：中国首个集城市湿地、农耕湿地、文化湿地于一体的国家湿地公园，5A 级景区，'一曲溪流一缕烟'的江南水乡景致。13:00-17:00 宋城：穿越古今、超越想象的景区，二十大剧院上百场演出，一天看不完，总有一款适合你。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Liangzhu Archaeological Ruins – Airport
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：良渚文化遗址 — 机场
timeline.desc_en: 10:00-12:30 Liangzhu Archaeological Site Park (良渚文化遗址公园): Dating back roughly 5,300–4,300 years, an important representative of early regional civilization in China and hailed as 'the definitive sacred ground proving 5,000 years of Chinese civilization.' 12:30-13:30 Lunch, then a timely transfer to the airport as the tour concludes.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:00-12:30 良渚文化遗址公园：距今约 5300-4300 年，中国早期区域文明的重要代表，被誉为'中华五千年文明的实证圣地'。12:30-13:30 午餐，适时送机，行程结束。

short_en: A tale of two Jiangnan cities in three days — classical Suzhou gardens, a thousand-year water town, and a slow boat across Hangzhou's legendary West Lake.
short_zh: 江南双城记，三天饱览苏州古典园林、千年水乡乌镇与杭州西湖。
desc_en: This three-day journey strings together the very best of Jiangnan, China's storied land of water and gardens. From Suzhou's UNESCO-listed Humble Administrator's Garden and the temple-bell poetry of Hanshan Temple, you cross to the timeless canals of Wuzhen water town and the immersive performances of Songcheng, before closing on the misty shores of Hangzhou's West Lake. It is a compact loop through two cities that pairs world cultural heritage with millennia-old water-town life.
desc_zh: 三天行程串联江南精华，一次饱览苏杭双城的园林与西湖。从苏州的世界文化遗产拙政园、因《枫桥夜泊》闻名的寒山寺，到千年水乡乌镇与穿越古今的宋城演艺，最后以烟波浩渺的杭州西湖收尾。一条紧凑的双城线路，将世界文化遗产与千年水乡风情一次串联。
what_to_bring_en: Passport, comfortable walking shoes, light layers, a foldable umbrella or rain jacket, sunscreen and hat, a power bank, and a payment app (Alipay/WeChat Pay) set up before arrival.
what_to_bring_zh: 护照、舒适步行鞋、轻便外套（可叠穿）、折叠雨伞或雨衣、防晒霜与遮阳帽、充电宝，以及出发前开通的支付宝/微信支付。

highlights.en: Humble Administrator's Garden (拙政园) — Suzhou's largest surviving classical garden and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where water-centered design unfolds a new scene at every step, the pinnacle of Jiangnan gardens.
highlights.zh: 拙政园 — 苏州现存最大的古典园林、世界文化遗产，以水为主、移步换景，江南园林之巅。

highlights.en: Hanshan Temple (寒山寺) — a thousand-year Suzhou monastery immortalized by Zhang Ji's poem 'Mooring by Maple Bridge at Night', the classic 'Maple Bridge night-mooring' landmark.
highlights.zh: 寒山寺 — 因张继《枫桥夜泊》闻名于世的苏州千年古刹，'枫桥夜泊'经典地标。

highlights.en: Wuzhen Water Town (乌镇) — a 5A-rated, thousand-year Jiangnan canal town in Tongxiang, 'China's last riverside dwellers' and the permanent home of the World Internet Conference.
highlights.zh: 乌镇 — 浙江桐乡 5A 级千年江南水乡，'中国最后的枕水人家'，世界互联网大会永久会址。

highlights.en: Songcheng (宋城) — a 'travel through time' theme park with twenty-plus theatres and over a hundred shows a day, more than you can see in a single visit.
highlights.zh: 宋城 — 穿越古今的景区，二十大剧院上百场演出，一天看不完。

highlights.en: West Lake (西湖) — Hangzhou's UNESCO World Heritage lake that witnessed the growth of Chinese Buddhist and Taoist culture and the tea-and-Zen tradition.
highlights.zh: 西湖景区 — 见证中国佛教文化、道教文化以及茶禅传统发展的杭州世界遗产名湖。

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Arrival – Humble Administrator's Garden – Hanshan Temple
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：机场接 — 拙政园 — 寒山寺
timeline.desc_en: 10:00-12:00 Transfer to Suzhou: airport pickup and onward journey to the city. 13:30-15:30 Humble Administrator's Garden (拙政园): Suzhou's largest surviving classical garden and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, water-centered with ever-changing views at every step — the pinnacle of Jiangnan gardens. 16:00-17:30 Hanshan Temple (寒山寺): a thousand-year Suzhou monastery made famous by Zhang Ji's poem 'Mooring by Maple Bridge at Night', the classic 'Maple Bridge night-mooring' landmark. Lunch and dinner included; overnight at a Suzhou hotel.
timeline.desc_zh: 10:00-12:00 前往苏州：机场接机，前往苏州市区。13:30-15:30 拙政园：苏州现存最大的古典园林，世界文化遗产，以水为主、移步换景，江南园林之巅。16:00-17:30 寒山寺：因张继《枫桥夜泊》闻名于世，苏州千年古刹，'枫桥夜泊'经典地标。含午餐、晚餐，入住苏州酒店。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Wuzhen – Songcheng
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：乌镇 — 宋城
timeline.desc_en: 11:00-12:30 Wuzhen (乌镇): a 5A-rated ancient town in Tongxiang, Zhejiang — a thousand-year Jiangnan water town known as 'China's last riverside dwellers' and the permanent venue of the World Internet Conference. 15:00-19:00 Songcheng (宋城): a scenic park that travels between past and present, with twenty-plus theatres staging over a hundred shows a day — more than you can take in within a single day. Breakfast, lunch and dinner included; overnight at a Hangzhou hotel.
timeline.desc_zh: 11:00-12:30 乌镇：浙江桐乡 5A 级古镇，千年江南水乡，'中国最后的枕水人家'，世界互联网大会永久会址。15:00-19:00 宋城：穿越古今的景区，二十大剧院上百场演出，一天看不完。含早、午、晚三餐，入住杭州酒店。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: West Lake – Airport
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：西湖 — 机场
timeline.desc_en: 09:30-12:30 West Lake Scenic Area (西湖景区): a UNESCO World Heritage site that witnessed the development of Chinese Buddhist and Taoist culture and the tea-and-Zen tradition. 12:30-13:30 Lunch, then a timely transfer to the airport and end of the tour. Breakfast and lunch included.
timeline.desc_zh: 09:30-12:30 西湖景区：见证中国佛教文化、道教文化以及茶禅传统的发展，世界遗产。12:30-13:30 午餐，适时送机，行程结束。含早餐、午餐。

short_en: Three days through Shanghai's classics, where lantern-lit old town gardens meet the neon skyline of the Bund and Lujiazui.
short_zh: 三天看遍上海经典——从豫园城隍庙的古典园林，到外滩与陆家嘴交相辉映的摩登夜色。
desc_en: Discover the "City of Dreams" by night and by day on this three-day tour that pairs Shanghai's living history with its dazzling modern skyline. You'll wander the Ming-dynasty gardens of Yuyuan and the City God Temple, stroll the plane-tree avenues of Sinan Road and the famous Nanjing Road, then dive into culture and design at the Shanghai Museum, Xintiandi, and the Tianzifang lane art quarter. The trip builds toward iconic skyline views, from the Oriental Pearl Tower and a Huangpu River ferry crossing to a final morning at the Bund and the Postal Museum.
desc_zh: 用三天时间，在白昼与夜色中读懂这座"魔都"——历史底蕴与摩登天际线在此交响。漫步明代私家园林豫园与道教城隍庙，沿思南路梧桐大道与南京路步行街悠然徜徉，再走进上海博物馆、新天地与田子坊石库门艺术弄堂，感受文化与设计的气息。行程渐入高潮：东方明珠、浦江轮渡夜游，直至最后一日的邮政博物馆与外滩万国建筑博览群。
what_to_bring_en: Comfortable walking shoes, passport and ID, light layers and a packable jacket, umbrella or rain jacket, sunscreen and a refillable water bottle, camera or phone for night skyline shots, and some cash for street snacks at the City God Temple.
what_to_bring_zh: 舒适的步行鞋、护照及身份证件、轻薄外套或可收纳夹克、雨伞或雨衣、防晒霜与水杯、用于拍摄夜景的相机或手机，以及少量现金用于城隍庙小吃。

highlights.en: Yuyuan Garden (豫园), a Ming-dynasty private garden ranked first among Shanghai's five surviving classical gardens
highlights.zh: 豫园——明代私家园林，位列上海现存五大古典园林之首

highlights.en: The City God Temple (城隍庙) old town quarter, with its Taoist temple, Nine-Bend Bridge, Mid-Lake Pavilion and famous local snacks
highlights.zh: 城隍庙老城厢——道教庙宇、九曲桥、湖心亭与老城隍庙小吃的独特文旅地标

highlights.en: The Shanghai Museum at People's Square, home to bronzes, ceramics, calligraphy, paintings and jade
highlights.zh: 上海博物馆（人民广场馆）——青铜器、陶瓷、书画、玉器等丰富馆藏

highlights.en: Tianzifang (田子坊), a maze of Shikumen lanes turned artists' quarter packed with vintage workshops and cafes
highlights.zh: 田子坊——石库门改造的艺术家创作基地，迷宫弄堂里的复古手工小店与特色咖啡馆

highlights.en: The 468-meter Oriental Pearl Tower in Lujiazui plus a Huangpu River ferry crossing for skyline views
highlights.zh: 468米高的陆家嘴东方明珠，搭配浦江轮渡，饱览天际线

highlights.en: The Bund (外滩), Shanghai's signature 1.5 km riverfront famed for its international architecture and night views
highlights.zh: 外滩——黄浦江畔约1.5公里，以万国建筑博览群与黄浦江夜景闻名

timeline.title_en: Day 1: Airport Pickup – Yuyuan – City God Temple – Sinan Road – Nanjing Road
timeline.title_zh: 第一天：机场接 — 豫园 — 城隍庙 — 思南路 — 南京路
timeline.desc_en: After airport pickup, the day explores Shanghai's old town and central streets. 09:00-10:30 Yuyuan Garden (豫园): a Ming-dynasty private garden ranked first among Shanghai's five surviving classical gardens. 10:40-12:10 City God Temple (城隍庙): a Zhengyi Taoist temple founded in the Ming dynasty that, together with the old town snacks, Nine-Bend Bridge and Mid-Lake Pavilion, forms a distinctive cultural landmark of Shanghai's old city. 13:30-15:00 Sinan Road (思南路): stroll leisurely or ride a shared bike along the plane-tree avenue, admiring the French-style villas lining both sides. 15:30-17:30 Nanjing Road Pedestrian Street (南京路步行街): an asymmetric layout where a 4.2-meter-wide 'golden belt' runs the length of the street, dotted with 34 uniquely styled flower beds. Meals: lunch and dinner. Overnight at a Shanghai hotel.
timeline.desc_zh: 机场接机后，开启上海老城厢与市中心街区之旅。09:00-10:30 豫园：明代私家园林，位列上海现存五大古典园林之首。10:40-12:10 城隍庙：始建于明代的道教正一派庙宇，与老城隍庙小吃、九曲桥、湖心亭构成上海老城厢独特文旅地标。13:30-15:00 思南路：悠然漫步或骑共享单车，沿梧桐大道欣赏两侧法式洋房别墅。15:30-17:30 南京路步行街：采用不对称布局，4.2米宽'金腰带'贯穿全街，34个造型各异的花坛点缀其间。餐食：午餐、晚餐。住宿：上海酒店。

timeline.title_en: Day 2: Shanghai Museum – Xintiandi – Tianzifang – Oriental Pearl Tower – Huangpu River Night Cruise
timeline.title_zh: 第二天：上博 — 新天地 — 田子坊 — 东方明珠 — 浦江夜游
timeline.desc_en: A full day of culture, design and skyline views. 09:00-11:30 Shanghai Museum (People's Square branch, 上海博物馆人民广场馆): rich collections spanning bronzes, ceramics, calligraphy, paintings and jade for a deep dive into Chinese history and culture. 13:00-15:00 Xintiandi (新天地): browse boutique shops in search of treasures or relax over coffee in a cafe. 15:00-15:40 Tianzifang (田子坊): converted from Shanghai's signature Shikumen building clusters into an artists' creative base, its maze-like lanes filled with retro handicraft shops and characterful cafes. 16:10-16:30 Oriental Pearl Tower (东方明珠, exterior view): standing in Lujiazui, Pudong, facing the Bund across the river, this 468-meter Shanghai landmark links 11 spheres large and small, inspired by 'large and small pearls falling on a jade plate.' 16:30 Bund Ferry (外滩轮渡, Jinling East Road to Dongchang Road): admire the Bund's exotic architecture and gaze across at the Lujiazui skyscrapers, a perfect fusion of history and modernity. Meals: breakfast, lunch and dinner. Overnight at a Shanghai hotel.
timeline.desc_zh: 全天文化、设计与天际线之旅。09:00-11:30 上海博物馆（人民广场馆）：馆藏丰富的文物，涵盖青铜器、陶瓷、书画、玉器等多个门类，深入了解中华历史文化。13:00-15:00 新天地：穿梭精品小店、淘换宝物，或在咖啡馆悠然小憩。15:00-15:40 田子坊：由上海独有的石库门建筑群改造，文人艺术家的创作基地，迷宫般弄堂里复古手工小店与特色咖啡馆。16:10-16:30 东方明珠（外观）：矗立浦东陆家嘴，与外滩隔江相望，上海地标。468米高，11个大小球体相连，灵感来自'大珠小珠落玉盘'。16:30 外滩轮渡（金陵东路 — 东昌路）：欣赏外滩异域建筑群，远眺陆家嘴摩天楼群，历史与现代的完美融合。餐食：早餐、午餐、晚餐。住宿：上海酒店。

timeline.title_en: Day 3: Postal Museum – The Bund – Airport
timeline.title_zh: 第三天：邮政博物馆 — 外滩 — 机场
timeline.desc_en: A relaxed final morning before departure. 09:00-10:30 Shanghai Postal Museum (上海邮政博物馆): housed in the Shanghai General Post Office building, with a railway-carriage post office and an array of old oil drums and vintage mailboxes telling the story of China's postal history. 11:00-12:00 The Bund (外滩): Shanghai's iconic riverfront, about 1.5 km along the Huangpu River, famed for its international architectural exhibition and the Huangpu River night views. 12:30-13:30 lunch, then a timely airport transfer; end of tour. Meals: breakfast and lunch.
timeline.desc_zh: 悠闲的最后半天，之后送机返程。09:00-10:30 上海邮政博物馆：上海邮政总局大楼内，可见火车车厢邮局，各种老油桶旧邮筒，了解中国邮政发展史。11:00-12:00 外滩：黄浦江畔约1.5公里长，上海标志性地标，以万国建筑博览群和黄浦江夜景闻名。12:30-13:30 午餐，适时送机，行程结束。餐食：早餐、午餐。
